race.comment: COVERT MISSION (1) gets the nod on resumption. He's shown ability in four runs to date, not far away first up last time in at Moe before placing in town as well. He can be an improver this time around and should take catching from out wide. SPIRIT OF GAIA (10) has had plenty of chances as a 14 start maiden but is going well, getting home strongly at Caulfield Heath when last seen 53 days ago. Off the freshen here but rates well. YELLOWKNIFE (11) is a mare by Vancouver on debut for the Hayes yard. She's been jumping out fairly well and draws softly, respecting. CRIES AND WHISPERS (2) resumes for his second campaign. He'd trialled well leading into that preparation and can be an improver this time around. MILLIONAIRE LOVER (12) is a gelding by Rich Enuff for the Hunter yard who should be ready to run well.
